programmes.show_description: In many people's opinion Queen are the greatest British band in the world! Sit back and enjoy as we play their biggest hits back to back!
Get the amps cranked up to 11 as Gary Davies is ready to rock with two hours of truly epic tracks! These are the 25 very best bands and artists that became '80s stadium superstars.

These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!

programmes.show_name: Let's Get Rocked! With Def Leppard
programmes.show_description: From our sister channel NOW 90s, Def Leppard's lead singer Joe Elliott with a 3-hour journey through the decade - 30 killer tracks hand-picked.
Buckle up & join Nicky for a journey down the dark roads of rock! Monsters of metal, Ghastly Axe grinders & Devilish anthems. It's going to be a spine-tingling, HELL of a ride!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
